negative_prompt_default: text, letters, words, signs, labels, scary, dark, sad, realistic photography, harsh lighting, modern digital art, anime, manga
style_rules: Premium Belgian watercolor and gouache with cinematic depth
Soft magical realism emphasizing warm brick architecture
Luminous firefly effects and crystal flower transparency
Rich texture showing rain-dampened gardens and weathered surfaces
Golden hour lighting filtering through diamond-paned windows
Premium Belgian watercolor and gouache with cinematic depth
Soft magical realism emphasizing warm brick architecture
Luminous firefly effects and crystal flower transparency
Rich texture showing rain-dampened gardens and weathered surfaces
Golden hour lighting filtering through diamond-paned windows
visualBible.palette: Warm ochre and sienna earth tones, deep forest greens, cream Belgian lace whites, sapphire blue magical accents, honeyed golden light
visualBible.lighting: Belgian golden hour filtering through bow windows, gentle firefly luminescence, warm interior amber glow, magical sparkle cascades
compositionRules: Child protagonist centered with confident posture and empathetic expression
Grandmother Alma maintains dignified Belgian elegance throughout
Miso provides visual continuity with distinctive tabby markings
Belgian architectural details: brick patterns, weathered terrace stones, diamond window panes
Each page escalates magical intensity toward climactic healing moment

identityRules: 7-year-old with chin-length chestnut brown bob hair, round hazel eyes with long lashes, rosy cheeks, small upturned nose, wearing sage green wool cardigan over cream linen shirt and dark brown corduroy pants with small brass buttons

Grandmother Alma: 65 years old, silver-grey hair in elegant low chignon, gentle blue eyes behind thin wire-rimmed spectacles, wearing cream wool apron over soft lavender cardigan, sturdy brown leather shoes, delicate gold wedding ring

Miso: small tabby cat with distinctive orange and black striped fur pattern, white chest patch shaped like a heart, white paws, bright emerald green eyes, pink triangular nose, fluffy tail with black rings
heroBible.characterDesign: The 7-year-old hero has a distinctive chin-length chestnut brown bob with slight waves, round hazel eyes that sparkle with curiosity, rosy apple cheeks, and wears a sage green wool cardigan over cream shirt with dark brown corduroy pants. Posture shows confident empathy - standing tall but leaning in to listen, hands often reaching out gently. Expression combines brave curiosity with tender concern for grandmother's wellbeing.
forbiddenDrift: Never alter child's chestnut brown bob haircut or hazel eyes with lashes
Never change Grandmother Alma's silver chignon or wire spectacles
Never modify Miso's distinctive orange-black tabby stripes or white heart-shaped chest patch
Never show characters with fearful or deeply distressed expressions
Never alter the warm sage-cream-lavender color palette of clothing
Never change the child's confident yet gentle empathetic posture
Never remove child's rosy cheeks or small upturned nose
Never change Miso's emerald green eyes or fluffy ringed tail

imageGeneration.negativePromptDefault: text, letters, words, signs, labels, scary, dark, sad, realistic photography, harsh lighting, modern digital art, anime, manga

rules: All text must be age-appropriate for 6-8 year olds
No text elements should appear in generated images
Each story page must advance the mystery-to-healing narrative arc
Magical elements must remain gentle and wonder-filled
Belgian cultural context must be authentically premium
Character visual consistency maintained through detailed identity rules

editorialScore.rationale: Strong emotional arc with clear progression from concern to magical discovery to healing connection. Authentic Belgian setting with rich cultural details. Age-appropriate language that reads beautifully aloud.

imageabilityScore.rationale: Excellent visual variety across pages. Each scene has clear, distinctive visual elements. Magical flowers and luminous effects provide strong focal points. Belgian architectural and garden elements enhance authenticity.

heroConsistencyScore.rationale: Clear physical descriptions for child hero, Grandmother Alma, and Miso cat. Consistent character presence across key scenes. Strong emotional continuity and character development.

localeCompletenessScore.rationale: Complete translations for all three target locales. Text semantically aligned while respecting language-specific cultural nuances. Consistent emotional tone across all versions.

pages.prompt_template: Premium watercolor gouache illustration, child with chestnut bob and grandmother with silver bun standing in magical Belgian garden with floating crystal flowers, warm brick house with diamond windows, golden hour cinematic lighting, soft magical realism style, gift-book quality

pages.text_template: who knows how to listen to the whispers of the heart

This morning, {child_name} senses something is amiss. Grandma Alma stares through the diamond-paned window at her garden, but her usual smile has vanished. Hot chocolate grows cold, forgotten. Miso, the little tabby cat, nudges the door with his nose and shoots a knowing glance.
pages.prompt_template: Watercolor gouache Belgian interior, child with chestnut bob watching grandmother with silver bun gazing wistfully through diamond-paned bow window, tabby cat near door, forgotten chocolate on wooden table, warm morning light, premium storybook style
pages.negative_prompt: text, letters, scary, dark, sad expressions, modern furniture, harsh lighting, digital art

pages.text_template: Behind the rain-dappled hydrangea hedge, {child_name} finds a path never seen before. Leaves shimmer like emerald jewels. Miso leaps ahead, tail high. At the mysterious path's end, a golden firefly dances before a rusty gate where wild roses climb.
pages.prompt_template: Enchanting watercolor scene, child following tabby cat through rain-dappled hydrangea passage with emerald-shimmering leaves, golden firefly illuminating rusty gate overgrown with wild roses, Belgian garden setting, magical forest lighting
pages.negative_prompt: text, letters, scary, dark, artificial lighting, modern elements, digital art

pages.text_template: In this secret garden, crystal flowers drift above golden moss. Within each translucent petal, tiny scenes come alive: a waltz beneath the gazebo, sugar waffles shared with joy, laughter bursting in the rain. {child_name} holds their breath, wonderstruck.
pages.prompt_template: Magical watercolor masterpiece, child with chestnut bob in sage cardigan reaching toward floating crystal flowers containing tiny luminous memory scenes, golden moss floor, ethereal lighting, premium fantasy storybook illustration
pages.negative_prompt: text, letters, scary, dark, realistic photo, harsh colors, digital art

pages.text_template: One sapphire flower, larger than the rest, trembles gently. In its blue petals, {child_name} glimpses young Grandma Alma with a white ribbon in her hair, laughing beneath a flowered bower. But the bloom closes slowly — no one remembers its secret melody.
pages.prompt_template: Delicate watercolor showing child studying large sapphire crystal flower containing luminous memory of young woman with white ribbon laughing under flowered gazebo, soft magical garden background, gentle melancholic beauty
pages.negative_prompt: text, letters, scary, dark, death imagery, harsh sadness, digital art

pages.text_template: Hand in hand, {child_name} and Grandma Alma return to the enchanted garden. Together, they hum a simple melody that Grandma suddenly recalls. The sapphire flower blooms in cascading warm sparkles, bathing their faces in golden light. Mystery transforms into healing.
pages.prompt_template: Climactic watercolor moment, child and grandmother humming together as massive sapphire crystal flower bursts in cascade of golden sparkles, illuminating their joyful faces and tabby cat, magical garden setting, peak healing transformation
pages.negative_prompt: text, letters, scary, dark, sad, harsh lighting, digital art

pages.text_template: On the weathered brick Belgian terrace, Grandma Alma now shares her rediscovered memory. {child_name} gently places a small luminous flower in a clay pot by the bow window. Garden fairy lights twinkle, Miso purrs curled up, and the entire house breathes peace.
pages.prompt_template: Peaceful watercolor evening scene, grandmother and child on weathered brick Belgian terrace, grandmother sharing stories while child tends small luminous flower in clay pot, sleeping tabby cat, fairy lights on house, perfect tranquil resolution
